codeReview.summary: Zig build environment successfully set up. Zig 0.14.0 installed to ~/.local/zig, cmuxd project created with proper build.zig and main.zig. Build completes without errors and executable runs correctly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker added Zig installation setup command to services.yaml with explicit download URL and installation steps. This is appropriate for reproducibility.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml now contains setup command that installs Zig 0.14.0 to ~/.local/zig

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker added PATH export to .factory/init.sh for Zig. This follows the existing pattern of init.sh for environment setup.

summary: PASS - Feature successfully implemented. Zig 0.14.0 installed and verified working. cmuxd project created with build.zig and main.zig.
